description: A colleague left behind a Stroop experiment that is supposed to work but does not. Fix all issues in the experiment file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/broken_stroop.psyexp using the conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/stroop_conditions.csv. The experiment must be a standard color-word Stroop task where participants see color words in different ink colors and press keys (left=red, down=green, right=blue). It must include an instructions screen before the trials, reference the conditions file, accept proper keyboard responses, and run a reasonable number of trials. Save the corrected experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stroop_fixed.psyexp. Login: user ga, password password123
